description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests-6.0.3 that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that starts a Couchbase 6.0.3 service, installs a build environment, checks out the repository with submodules, sets up Ruby 2.6, installs dependencies with bundle install, initializes Couchbase, compiles an extension with rake, displays the library version, checks the Couchbase cluster, and runs tests with a 15-minute timeout.
